title: Cuneiform Tablet #0358: Achaemenid Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
